name: Future Man
abstract: Roy Wilfred Wooten (born October 13, 1957), also known as RoyEl, best known by his stage name Future Man (also written Futureman and known to fans as Futche), is an American musician, inventor and composer. He is best known as a member of jazz and bluegrass quartet Béla Fleck and the Flecktones, along with banjoist Béla Fleck, harmonicis…

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Bela Fleck and The Flecktones/ Del McCoury Band
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Bela Fleck
about_quotes.evidence: there’s a piece on the last album that Future Man and I wrote together called “New Math”
about_quotes.doc_title: Bela Fleck interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, December 7, 2004
